_source: Ai QTO equations.pdf — authoritative formula specification

sub_structure.name: Foundation — Concrete
sub_structure.formula_python: sum(w * l * d * n  for each footing type)
sub_structure.description: width × length × depth × count  (per footing type, summed)

sub_structure.name: Foundation — PCC
sub_structure.formula_python: sum((l + 0.20) * (w + 0.20) * pcc_thickness * n  for each footing type)

sub_structure.name: Foundation — Bitumen Waterproofing
sub_structure.formula_python: sum((w*l + 2*(w+l)*d) * n  for each footing type)
sub_structure.description: (area + perimeter × depth) × count  (per footing type, summed)

sub_structure.name: Neck Columns — Concrete
sub_structure.formula_python:
height = GFL + exc_depth - tb_depth - pcc_thickness
perimeter = 2 * (width + length)
volume = perimeter * height * count
sub_structure.description: Perimeter × Height × count;  Height = GFL + exc_depth − tb_depth − pcc_thickness

sub_structure.name: Tie Beams — Concrete
sub_structure.formula_python: sum(l * w * d * n  for each beam type)
sub_structure.description: length × width × depth × count  (per beam type, summed)

sub_structure.name: Tie Beams — PCC
sub_structure.formula_python: sum(l * (w + 0.20) * pcc_thickness * n  for each beam type)

sub_structure.name: Tie Beams — Bitumen Waterproofing
sub_structure.formula_python: sum(l * d * 2 * n  for each beam type)

sub_structure.name: Solid Block Work (Below Grade)
sub_structure.formula_python:
height = GFL + exc_depth - tb_depth - pcc_thickness
area = sum(wall_length * height * count)

sub_structure.name: Excavation
sub_structure.formula_python:
area = (2 + longest_length) * (2 + longest_width)
volume = area * exc_depth
sub_structure.description: (2m + longest_length) × (2m + longest_width) = area;  area × exc_depth = volume

sub_structure.name: Back Filling
sub_structure.formula_python:
gross = exc_area * (exc_depth + gfsl_level)
net   = max(gross - all_placed_concrete_volumes, 0)
sub_structure.description: (exc_area × (exc_depth + GFSL)) − all_placed_concrete_volumes;  excludes excavation and sand-fill volumes

sub_structure.name: Sand Filling Under Ground Floor Slab

super_structure.name: Slabs — Concrete
super_structure.formula_python: volume = sum(area * thickness  for each slab)

super_structure.name: Beams — Concrete
super_structure.formula_python: volume = sum(l * w * max(d - slab_thickness, 0) * n  for each beam type)
super_structure.description: length × width × (depth − slab_thickness) × count  (excludes slab portion)

super_structure.name: Columns — Concrete
super_structure.formula_python: volume = sum(l * w * floor_height * qty  for each column type)
super_structure.description: length × width × floor_height × qty  (per column type, summed)

super_structure.name: Staircase — Concrete
super_structure.formula_python:
steps = round(floor_height / 0.175)
going = 0.25
riser = floor_height / steps
inclined_len = sqrt((steps*going)**2 + floor_height**2)
waist_vol = inclined_len * stair_width * 0.15
step_vol   = 0.5 * going * riser * stair_width * steps
landing_vol= stair_width * stair_width * slab_thickness
volume     = (waist_vol + step_vol + landing_vol) * stair_count

finishes.name: Wet Areas Flooring
finishes.formula_python: area = toilets + bathrooms + kitchens + pantries + laundry

finishes.name: Marble Threshold
finishes.description: sum of widths of all doors

finishes.name: Internal Plaster
finishes.formula_python:
gross = internal_walls_area * 2 + external_walls_area
deductions = doors_area * 2 + windows_area
area = max(gross - deductions, 0)

finishes.name: Waterproofing (1st Floor Wet Areas)
finishes.description: all 1st floor wet areas + balcony flooring area

finishes.name: Combo Roof System
finishes.description: roof_slab_area × 1.2  (20% uplift for upturns and overlaps)

finishes.name: Openings — Doors
finishes.formula_python: area = sum(width * height * count  for each door type)
finishes.description: length × width × count  (per door type, summed)

finishes.name: Openings — Windows
finishes.formula_python: area = sum(width * height * count  for each window type)
finishes.description: length × width × count  (per window type, summed)

finishes.name: Thermal Block (External Walls)
finishes.formula_python: area = schedule_area  if provided  else  avg_thermal_block * (plot_area / avg_plot_area)
finishes.description: per project schedule; fallback: scaled from historical average

finishes.name: Interlock Paving
finishes.formula_python: area = schedule_area  if provided  else  avg_interlock * (plot_area / avg_plot_area)
finishes.description: per project schedule; fallback: scaled from historical average

finishes.name: False Ceiling
finishes.formula_python: area = schedule_area  if provided  else  avg_false_ceiling * (plot_area / avg_plot_area)
finishes.description: per project schedule; fallback: scaled from historical average

finishes.name: Roof Waterproofing
finishes.formula_python: area = schedule_area  if provided  else  avg_roof_wp * (plot_area / avg_plot_area)
finishes.description: per project schedule; fallback: scaled from historical average

finishes.name: External Paint
finishes.description: = External Villa Walls Finish area  (same surface)

finishes.name: Kitchen / Pantry Countertop
finishes.description: 3.5 RM per kitchen + 2.5 RM per pantry
